inputs.label: n (non-negative integer)
inputs.businessContext: Index of the Catalan number to compute

formulas.catalanNumber: Math.round(Math.exp(2 * n * Math.log(2) - (n + 0.5) * Math.log(n + 1) - (n + 0.5) * Math.log(n + 2) + 0.5 * Math.log(2 * Math.PI)))
formulas.catalanExact: n === 0 ? 1 : Math.round(Math.exp(2 * n * Math.log(2) - (n + 0.5) * Math.log(n + 1) - (n + 0.5) * Math.log(n + 2) + 0.5 * Math.log(2 * Math.PI)))
